title: Add AGI Desktop Personal Assistant (AGI-DPA) to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AGI Desktop Personal Assistant (AGI-DPA)](https://github.com/ydsgangge-ux/AGI-DPA) to bots
- Provides an AI-powered desktop assistant with a dual-personality system, AGI Desktop Personal Assistant (AGI-DPA).

Fixes #10059

gist.headline: Dual personalities on desktop
gist.blurb: The greenhouse is growing! AGI-DPA just landed in our community showcase, bringing a dual-personality AI desktop assistant to your local machine.
gist.summary: Added the AGI Desktop Personal Assistant (AGI-DPA), a dual-personality AI desktop bot, to the community showcase and greenhouse directories.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore AGI-DPA from the community apps list to run an AI-powered assistant directly on their desktop.
gist.visual_concept: A retro desktop computer with a split screen or two different faces on the monitor, representing the dual personality. Polly the bee interacting with the computer.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a retro desktop computer with a split-screen monitor showing two different cute pixel faces, representing a dual-personality AI assistant. The cute bee mascot Polly, wearing tiny reading glasses, sits on the keyboard looking up at the screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a retro desktop computer with a split-screen monitor showing two different cute pixel faces, representing a dual-personality AI assistant. The cute bee mascot Polly, wearing tiny reading glasses, sits on the keyboard looking up at the screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background.
